overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an astronaut in a spacesuit navigating through a dense asteroid field in zero gravity. The character is silhouetted against a bright distant star while slowly maneuvering past large floating rocks, creating a serene and isolated deep-space atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep space asteroid field with large irregular rocks

agents.ego_description: floating steadily through the asteroid field in zero gravity, approaching a large dark asteroid on the left

entered.detail: massive dark rock with irregular surface, silhouetted against the starlight
medium-sized gray rock with rough texture floating to the right of the character
intense white-blue light source creating backlighting and lens flare effects
numerous small rocks and debris floating throughout the background space

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of an astronaut floating in deep space, surrounded by a field of asteroids. A massive irregular asteroid looms in the upper left while smaller rocks scatter the background, all backlit by a bright distant star that creates a dramatic silhouette effect.

scene_state.functional_zone: open deep space with dispersed asteroid density

events.description: character passes the large asteroid, which transitions from foreground obstacle to background element

agents.ego_description: continuing to navigate through the asteroid field, moving beyond the large asteroid into more open space with scattered debris

segments.scene_description: The character continues drifting through space, having passed the large asteroid which now recedes into the background. The camera maintains a steady follow as the astronaut moves through a denser field of smaller asteroids, with the bright star continuing to illuminate the scene from behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate asteroid field, transitioning from a close encounter with a massive rock to a drift through a denser cluster of debris. It begins with a third-person view of an astronaut silhouetted against a bright distant star, with a massive irregular asteroid looming prominently in the upper left. As the character drifts forward, the large asteroid recedes into the background, opening up the field of vision. The camera maintains a steady follow as the scene shifts into a more crowded expanse of smaller floating rocks, all while the distant star continues to cast a dramatic backlight across the void.
